parse.title: Opportunity
parse.wikitext:
: ''For the removed {{ai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item, see {{ii|Certainty}}.''
{{Item info
|goldvalue = 
{{gold value|Preparation Gold Value|nolink=}}
* {{rd|11|5}} [[lethality]] = {{rd|{{g|{{#vardefineecho:preparationmelee|{{#expr:{{#var:lethality}}*11}}}}}}|{{g|{{#vardefineecho:preparationranged|{{#expr:{{#var:lethality}}*5}}}}}}}}
** '''Total Gold Value''' = {{rd|{{g|{{#vardefineecho:preparationtotalmelee|{{#expr:{{#var:total}}+{{#var:preparationmelee}}}}}}}}|{{g|{{#vardefineecho:preparationtotalranged|{{#expr:{{#var:total}}+{{#var:preparationranged}}}}}}}}}}
|goldefficiency = 
* While {{sbc|Preparation}} is active, {{ii|Opportunity}} becomes {{rd|{{gec|Opportunity|{{#var:preparationtotalmelee}}}}|{{gec|Opportunity|{{#var:preparationtotalranged}}}}}} gold efficient.
|similaritems =Edge of Night;Axiom Arc;Hubris;Voltaic Cyclosword;Youmuu's Ghostblade;Umbral Glaive;The Collector;Serpent's Fang;Profane Hydra;Bastionbreaker 
|background = 
|notes = 
* {{sbc|Preparation's}} combat timer will reset from dealing damage to any unit, instead of only champions.{{bug}}
** The cooldown in the HUD will fail to display that it has reset in this case.{{bug}}
|strategy = 
|oldicons = 
|trivia = 
[[File:Shadow Isles Crest icon.png|link=Shadow Isles|100px|center]]
|quotes = 
|media = 
<gallery captionalign="center" orientation="square" spacing="small">
Opportunity movement speed VFX.png|Movement Speed VFX
</gallery>
|revisions = 
|patchhistory = 
;[[V26.09]] - Removed
* Removed from the game.

;[[V25.08]]
* Lethality increased to 18 from 15.
* Preparation lethality for {{tip|ranged}} champions reduced to 5 from 7.

;[[V14.22]]
* {{sbc|New recipe:}} {{ii|Pickaxe}} + {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Long Sword}} + {{g|475}} = {{g|2700}}.
** {{sbc|Old recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{g|925}} = {{g|2700}}.
* Attack damage increased to 55 from 50.
* Movement speed reduced to 0% from 4%.
* Preparation lethality increased to {{rd|11|7}} from {{rd|10|6}}.

;[[V14.19]]
* Combine cost increased to {{g|925}} from {{g|800}}.
** Total cost unchanged.
* Attack damage reduced to 50 from 55.
* Lethality reduced to 15 from 18.
* Movement speed reduced to 4% from 5%.
* Preparation bonus lethality increased to {{rd|10|6}} at all levels from {{rd|5;5.5 to 10 for 10|5*0.6;5.5*0.6 to 10*0.6 for 10|levels=1;9 to 18|pp=true}}.

;[[V14.14]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} On form-swapping champions, Preparation's bonus no longer indefinitely persists at a range modifier that corresponds to the first form swap after gaining Preparation, and until the passive has incurred one cooldown without having swapped forms.
** Now properly updates the range modifier along with form changes.

;[[V14.13]]
* Preparation lethality reduced to {{rd|5;5.5 to 10 for 10|5*0.6;5.5*0.6 to 10*0.6 for 10|levels=1;9 to 18|pp=true}} from {{pp|5;5.5 to 10 for 10|1;9 to 18|formula=5 + 0.5 starting at level 9}} for all users.
* Extraction bonus movement speed increased to 200 from 150.

;[[V14.12]]
* {{sbc|Bug Fix:}} The item's innate lethality is now a proper statistic. This is a residual change from patch [[V14.9|14.9]]'s update to lethality.

;[[V14.11]]
* Can no longer be upgraded to {{ii|Certainty}}.

;[[V14.1]] - Added
* {{sbc|Recipe:}} {{ii|Serrated Dirk}} + {{ii|Rectrix}} + {{g|800}} = {{g|2700}}.
* {{sbc|Stats:}} 55 attack damage, 18 lethality, 5% movement speed.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Preparation:}} After being out-of-combat with enemy champions for 8 seconds, gain {{as|{{pp|5;5.5 to 10 for 10|1;9 to 18|formula=5 + 0.5 starting at level 9}} lethality}}. This bonus remains for 3 seconds after dealing damage to an enemy champion.
* {{sbc|Unique Passive - Extraction:}} Scoring a {{tip|takedown}} against an enemy champion within 3 seconds of damaging them grants you {{as|150 '''bonus''' movement speed}} that decays over {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
* Limited to 1 '''Opportunity'''.
* {{cai|Living Forge|Ornn|Masterwork}} item: {{ii|Certainty}}.
** {{sbc|Stats:}} 70 attack damage, 27 lethality, 8% movement speed.
* {{sbc|Caption:}} "Sometimes, you need to make your own..."
}}
